task_description: Implement Phase 4 - Firewall and Network Security Engine with Rule Engine, Rule Persistence, Connection Tracker, Packet Filter, IP Blocklist, Geo Blocking, DNS Filter, Bandwidth Monitor, IDS/IPS, Network Isolation, Connection Logger, and Application Control

verification.summary: Full build passes with 0 errors. All 257 test cases pass (0 failed). Tests exercise real logic paths including CIDR IP matching, port scan detection, wildcard DNS matching, rate limiting, and rule evaluation. Docker not available in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode.
